name: AI RMF 1.0 ↔ OECD / EO / Blueprint AI Bill of Rights Crosswalk
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST-published crosswalk mapping AI RMF 1.0 to: OECD AI Principles, US Executive Orders on AI, and the Blueprint for an AI Bill of Rights. Single document, multiple-framework mapping.
relationToCloudSecurity: Helps cloud-hosted AI implementers understand overlap between US-policy frameworks and the AI RMF.
relationToAISecurity: Major bridge between AI RMF and US AI policy instruments.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from source PDF via the marker pipeline.

frameworks_covered: Blueprint for an AI Bill of Rights

notes: Three-way crosswalk in a single document.
